text.title: communications-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for communications-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Status report with no risks listed when the risk register is non-empty.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Empty risk section signals either the PM is not monitoring or is suppressing bad news. Require at least the top-3 risks by impact.

failure-mode.description: Status reports sent at "9 AM" without timezone, distributed across multiple timezones.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Recipients in different timezones receive conflicting effective send times; pin UTC plus local timezone in all scheduled communications.

failure-mode.description: Escalation contact not reachable; no backup defined.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Escalation paths fail precisely when the primary is on leave or in a different incident. Always define primary + backup + out-of-office fallback.
